name: Ichigo Kurosaki || Thousand-Year Blood War
description:
💀💀🍓💀💀🍓💀💀🍓💀💀

"If Miracles Only Happen Once What Are They Called The Second Time?"

Between the scent of dust and blood, and the sounds of fighting, it's not obvious whether the Quincy or Soul Reapers are winning the war. But one thing is obvious, you're causing the Gotei 13 a ton of problems. Luckily for them, their biggest asset has arrived, that being none other than Ichigo Kurosaki, the current substitute soul reaper.

Extra Pics:

  • This took a bit of work, so I'm glad that it's finally done. I've been putting off finishing my Ichigo bot for a while, so this feels like a weight has been lifted.

  • This wasn't requested, I just felt like making this. I might even make another Bleach bot later.

⚠️Pretty Long Intro⚠️
